records.name: Portfolio Design Release Process
records.description: Defines release expectations for portfolio validation design and example work before aggregate report behavior ships.
records.branchStrategy: Sprint branches merge through pull requests into main after local and hosted checks pass.
records.tagPolicy: Version tags are cut only after release-prep PRs merge to main and release checks pass.
records.approvalPolicy: Maintainers review README, changelog, roadmap, examples, tests, and release notes together.
records.artifactPolicy: Portfolio examples and docs ship as package documentation and repository examples.

records.name: Maintained Portfolio Operations
records.description: Defines lightweight maintenance operations for portfolio examples, docs, and future reports.
records.incidentPolicy: Broken portfolio examples, stale report expectations, or missing README links are tracked as release-blocking defects.
records.monitoringPolicy: Local and hosted validation checks review portfolio examples during each release.

records.name: Portfolio Foundation Support Policy
records.description: Defines support expectations for portfolio validation examples and design notes.
records.responsePolicy: Portfolio validation bugs and documentation drift are triaged through public issues.
records.escalationPolicy: Escalate defects that invalidate example validation or release integrity to the release owner.

records.name: Portfolio Example Maintenance Policy
records.description: Defines how portfolio examples and future aggregate report fixtures stay aligned with built-in packs.
records.updateCadence: Review portfolio examples whenever pack schemas, readiness gates, graph behavior, or dependency guidance changes.
records.dependencyPolicy: Keep portfolio examples local-only until workspace dependencies are implemented and documented.
records.compatibilityPolicy: Workspace-format changes must update portfolio examples, roadmap entries, and compatibility manifests together.

records.name: Portfolio Record Archive Policy
records.description: Defines archive expectations for portfolio examples, report fixtures, and related release notes.
records.retentionPolicy: Retain versioned portfolio examples, docs, report fixtures, and release verification summaries.

records.name: Portfolio Transition Decommission Policy
records.description: Defines how transitional portfolio examples should be retired after first-class workspace dependencies and aggregate reports exist.
records.dataHandling: No production customer data is represented by this example workspace.
records.communicationPlan: Document replacement guidance in README, portfolio docs, and release notes.
